headings.text: The signal that paid for itself in 11 days.
The shape of a quarter, redrawn.
Get a custom ROI projection from your CRM in under 10 minutes.

paragraphs.text: Growth teams using Lumivex don't just close more pipeline — they close it faster, at higher ACV, and against incumbents they used to lose to. Here is the receipt.
Real quotes from real revenue leaders shipping with Lumivex today.

Lumivex flagged 14 enterprise accounts as buying-ready three weeks before they hit Gartner's radar. We closed seven of them at an average of $214K ACV. It is, full stop, the most asymmetric tool in my stack.

We replaced four point solutions with Lumivex's signal layer in 90 days. Our SDRs went from 11 meetings booked per week to 38, and our pipeline coverage ratio crossed 4× for the first time since 2021.

In healthcare, timing is everything — committees move fast or not at all. Lumivex tells us which hospital systems are actively re-evaluating, so we arrive with answers instead of cold outreach. Our win rate tripled.
A snapshot of measurable outcomes across our 2024 customer cohort.
Median performance across customers 90 days before onboarding versus 90 days after going live.
Signal intelligence for growth teams who refuse to wait for the hand-raise.
